title: Spicy British Salad
description: A British-inspired salad with a spicy kick.

ingredients.name: Mixed greens
ingredients.notes: Any combination of lettuce, spinach, and/or kale

ingredients.name: Spicy cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: Any sharp cheddar cheese will work

ingredients.name: Clove of garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince or press for best flavor

ingredients.name: Crunchy pecans
ingredients.notes: Any nut will work, toasted for best flavor

instructions: Cook crispy bacon until golden brown and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, shredded cheese, thinly sliced red onion, and minced garlic.
Toss in chopped pecans for added crunch.
Top salad with crispy bacon and serve immediately.
